Returns the continuation token for the next page request, or null to start from the beginning.

Returns when the bucket/container was created.
getEtag() - Method in class io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.Blob
Returns the provider ETag, typically an identifier for a specific version of the blob content.

getNextContinuationToken() - Method in class io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.client.pagination.ListingPage
Returns the token to pass into the next PageRequest, or null when there is no next page.
getPageSize() - Method in class io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.client.pagination.PageRequest
Returns the requested page size, or null to use the provider default.
